virtualTable.name: vw_heat
virtualTable.sql: SELECT 'point-' || p.id AS fid, p.geom::geometry(Point,4326) AS geom FROM tbl_point p WHERE p.is_deleted = false AND p.is_active = true AND p.user_id = %uid% UNION ALL SELECT 'line-' || l.id AS fid, ST_Centroid(l.geom)::geometry(Point,4326) AS geom FROM tbl_line l WHERE l.is_deleted = false AND l.is_active = true AND l.user_id = %uid% UNION ALL SELECT 'polygon-' || g.id AS fid, ST_PointOnSurface(g.geom)::geometry(Point,4326) AS geom FROM tbl_polygon g WHERE g.is_deleted = false AND g.is_active = true AND g.user_id = %uid%
